message:
🌱 ui: icon spacing, fix jitter, unique cached tab names (#99)

- Added spacing (ml:1) between trash and close icons on tabs
- Fixed tab bar jitter by using fixed height and inset box-shadow instead of border
- Tab names are now unique (appends -2, -3 etc. for duplicates)
- Tab names are cached in localStorage keyed by tmux session name
- Cached names survive restarts and are restored on re-adoption
- Terminating a session clears its cached name
- Double-click rename also persists to cache

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
